ogTitle: Weddell vs West Arnhem: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weddell and West Arnhem.
heading: Weddell vs West Arnhem — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weddell, Northern Territory and West Arnhem, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Arnhem has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Weddell (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weddell or West Arnhem safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weddell has a flood risk score of 46/100, while West Arnhem scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weddell scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. West Arnhem scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weddell or West Arnhem?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Arnhem has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
